highest_upper_bound_x_label: For series "{target_series_label}", which x-axis label has the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}?
Find the x-axis label where "{target_series_label}" has the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}.
Looking only at "{target_series_label}", which x label has the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}?
Which visible x-axis label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase} for "{target_series_label}"?
For "{target_series_label}", identify the x-axis label with the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}.
lowest_lower_bound_x_label: For series "{target_series_label}", which x-axis label has the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}?
Find the x-axis label where "{target_series_label}" has the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}.
Looking only at "{target_series_label}", which x label has the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}?
Which visible x-axis label corresponds to the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase} for "{target_series_label}"?
For "{target_series_label}", identify the x-axis label with the {extremum_phrase} {bound_phrase}.
overlap_target_errorbar_at_x_count: At x-axis label "{target_x_label}", how many other series have error bars that overlap the error bar for "{target_series_label}"?
Compare all series at "{target_x_label}". How many other error bars overlap "{target_series_label}"?
At "{target_x_label}", count the other series whose error-bar interval overlaps the interval for "{target_series_label}".
Using the error bars at x label "{target_x_label}", how many non-target series overlap "{target_series_label}"?
For x label "{target_x_label}", how many other series share any error-bar range with "{target_series_label}"?

query:highest_upper_bound_x_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible x-axis label as a string
query:highest_upper_bound_x_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the selected error-bar endpoint

query:lowest_lower_bound_x_label.answer_hint: set "answer" to the exact visible x-axis label as a string
query:lowest_lower_bound_x_label.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to the [x,y] pixel point on the selected error-bar endpoint

query:overlap_target_errorbar_at_x_count.answer_hint: set "answer" to the requested integer count
query:overlap_target_errorbar_at_x_count.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an array of lower-to-upper error-bar interval segments for the counted overlapping marks, each segment written as [[x0,y0],[x1,y1]]
